papers.title: Handroid: Bridging Dexterous Hand and Humanoid
papers.method: 20-DoF hand kinematics + 12-DoF humanoid locomotion via PD-controlled gait generation
papers.notes: Scaled-down: simulated environment, no hardware. Kinematics verified for correctness. Locomotion uses simplified PD controller.

papers.title: Nonequilibrium thermodynamics of feedback-control: a phase-space perspective
papers.method: Szilard engine with finite-resolution demon measurement, generalized unavailable information

metrics.key_finding: Info diverges as log2(M), work bounded at kT*ln(2)

papers.notes: Core result confirmed: 100k cycles per resolution, finite-resolution unavailable information quantified.

papers.title: The Internet of Things for Smart Manufacturing: A Review

metrics.reason: Review paper surveys existing IoT/cloud/cybersecurity technologies, no reproducible algorithm

papers.notes: Conceptual VM network topology generator included as minimal demonstration.

papers.title: Fast logical operations in quantum LDPC codes using simple resource states
papers.method: Cat-state joint measurement + scheduler code for commuting logical operators
papers.notes: Small Hamming(7,4) code used as proxy. Speedup matches theoretical ~3x. Full Q70/Q102 simulation would require larger code instances.

papers.title: Adaptive Fault Injection Planning for Multi-Layer Self-Healing AI Infrastructure
papers.method: ADA-ST: weighted fault-propagation graph + iterative activity-guided scenario selection + FLAM cross-generation transfer
papers.notes: Synthetic graphs used. Paper claims 10 iters for Alpha, 92% static coverage gap. Our synthetic graph gives 21.9% static coverage (matches paper's 20-25%). FLAM fidelity lower due to random graph generation.
